title: Cosponsorship network on federal public-lands bills
source: GPO govinfo.gov BILLSTATUS bulk data. Nodes are legislators who cosponsored at least 2 bills in the curated set; edges connect pairs sharing 2 or more cosponsorships. See scripts/build_cosponsorship_network.py for the bill list.
